testcase.name: wait_for_simulation_completion

failure.message: Timeout waiting for DB condition: SELECT status FROM zone_simulations WHERE id = :simulation_id AND status = 'completed' LIMIT 1

testcase.failure: Timeout waiting for DB condition: SELECT status FROM zone_simulations WHERE id = :simulation_id AND status = 'completed' LIMIT 1

testcase.name: simulation_completed_with_meta

failure.message: Timeout waiting for DB condition: SELECT status, scenario->'simulation'->>'real_duration_minutes' as real_duration_minutes, scenario->'simulation'->>'orchestrator' as orchestrator, scenario->'simulation'->>'real_ended_at' as real_ended_at FROM zone_simulations WHERE id = :simulation_id AND status = 'completed' AND scenario->'simulation'->>'real_ended_at' IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1

testcase.failure: Timeout waiting for DB condition: SELECT status, scenario->'simulation'->>'real_duration_minutes' as real_duration_minutes, scenario->'simulation'->>'orchestrator' as orchestrator, scenario->'simulation'->>'real_ended_at' as real_ended_at FROM zone_simulations WHERE id = :simulation_id AND status = 'completed' AND scenario->'simulation'->>'real_ended_at' IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
